title: dissotis incana
intro: Dissotis incana, also known as the grey dissotis, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is native to tropical Africa, commonly found in wetlands and riverbanks. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Dissotis incana can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations or ingested to aid in the relief of various health issues.
